name: tool_use
description: Tests tool selection accuracy: verifies the agent chooses the correct tool for common tasks.

cases.name: list-directory
cases.input: List files in the current directory

cases.name: search-codebase
cases.input: Search for TODO comments in the codebase

cases.name: create-file
cases.input: Create a new file called test.txt with the content 'hello world'

cases.name: web-search
cases.input: What's the weather in Stockholm today?

cases.name: edit-file
cases.input: Replace the word 'foo' with 'bar' in main.go

cases.name: append-to-file
cases.input: Append a new line to the end of notes.txt

cases.name: analyze-image
cases.input: Describe what's in the screenshot at ./screenshot.png

cases.name: web-browse
cases.input: Open https://example.com and extract the main heading
